mentions.note: Data center power/cooling infrastructure play; part of electricity/cooling ecosystem for AI chips; positive fundamentals but market dislikes data center plays now.
Electrical/cooling infrastructure for data centers; will be used in new Nvidia deployment; solid business but market currently disliking data center exposure.
Power infrastructure and backup generator supplier to AI data centers.
Energy infrastructure buildout beneficiary; second-tier confidence in power distribution for AI boom.
Makes transformers connecting grid to data centers; benefits from utilities' need to double capacity; steady industrial play on infrastructure boom.
Data-center plays had big runs; tend to sell off after rallies. Cramer cautious on travel trusts and related beneficiaries.
